Multiple Choice C 1 4-PS3-2 PS 0.49 THE STATE EDUCATION DEPARTMENT * This item map identifies the Performance Expectation with which each test question is aligned. All NYSP-12SLS Performance Expectations are three-dimensional (https://www.nysed.gov/sites/default/files/programs/standards-instruction/p-12-science- learning-standards.pdf). The integration of these three dimensions provides students with a context for the content of science (DCI), the methods by which science knowledge is acquired and understood (SEP), and the ways in which the sciences are connected through concepts that have universal meaning across the disciplines (CCC).
